## Military Mercenaries

#### 0-1 Canid Officer (Cost: 2 Glory)

Only an Astra Militarum Warband can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Canid Officer | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+0 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Canid Officer is equipped with its Bite. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Bite.** Melee

**Abilities**

* **Bark Orders.** The Canid Officer outranks common soldiers. It can give Orders as if it were an ELITE model, but with a range of only 3”, even if it is promoted to Elite.  
* **Canid Swiftness.** The Canid Officer has \+1 DICE to all Dash and Jump Success Rolls  
* **Fetch.** The Canid Officer can drag along any Down model within 1” when it moves, moving at half speed with the other model following directly behind it, both with normal movement or when dashing. If this takes that model out of melee combat, this does not trigger a free Fight Action.  
* **Pet.** Select one other non-ARTIFICIAL, non-BEAST model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Canid Officer forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner (though it may outrank that model if it is not ELITE).

**Keywords**  
BEAST, MILITARUM

#### 0-1 Deathworld Veteran (Cost: 4 Glory)

Cannot be taken by Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Astartes, or Adeptus Custodes Warbands.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Deathworld Veteran | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Deathworld Veteran is equipped with Standard Armour, an Autopistol, a Halberd, a Close Combat Weapon, a Combat Helmet, and Filter Plugs.

* **Autopistol.** 12”, ASSAULT  
* **Halberd.** Melee, BLOCK, TWO-HANDED  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.  
* **Filter Plugs.** The model has NEGATE GAS.

**Abilities**

* **Knifer.** The Deathworld Veteran has \+1 INJURY DICE with its Close Combat Weapon.  
* **Weathered.** Injury rolls against the Deathworld Veteran have \-1 DICE.

**Keywords**  
MILITARUM, STRONG

#### 0-1 Penal Legionnaire (Cost: 3 Glory)

Cannot be taken by Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Astartes, or Adeptus Custodes Warbands.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Penal Legionnaire | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | \-1 | 28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Penal Legionnaire is equipped with Standard Armour, a Hand Flamer, a Chain Blade, and Filter Plugs.

* **Hand Flamer.** 6”, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, \-2 INJURY DICE, FIRE  
* **Chain Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Filter Plugs.** The model has NEGATE GAS.

**Abilities**

* **Cruel.** The Penal Legionnaire has \+1 DICE to Hit enemies that have at least 1 BLOOD MARKER.

**Keywords**  
MILITARUM, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-1 Ratling Sniper (Cost: 3 Glory)

An Outlaw Warband can also take this Mercenary. Cannot be taken by Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Astartes, Adeptus Custodes, or Astra Militarum Warbands.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Ratling Sniper | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \-1 | \-1 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Ratling Sniper is equipped with Standard Armour, a Longlas, a Close Combat Weapon, a Combat Helmet, and Photo Goggles. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Longlas.** 48”, \+1 DICE, CRITICAL, RISKY  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.  
* **Photo Goggles.** The equipped model ignores the STEALTH Keyword when making ranged attacks. In addition, the range of its weapons cannot be reduced.

**Abilities**

* **Clamber.** The Ratling Tankstopper has \+1 DICE to all Climb Success Rolls.  
* **Deadshot.** When the Ratling makes a ranged attack with a TWO-HANDED weapon, it can choose to suffer \-1 DICE to Hit in exchange for \+1 INJURY DICE.

**Keywords**  
MILITARUM, SKIRMISHER, STEALTH

#### 0-1 Ratling Tankstopper (Cost: 4 Glory)

Only an Astra Militarum, Inquisition, or Rogue Trader Warband can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Ratling Tankstopper  | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \-1 | \-1 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Ratling Tankstopper is equipped with Standard Armour, a Tankstopper Rifle, a Close Combat Weapon, a Combat Helmet, and Photo Goggles. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Tankstopper Rifle.** 36”, \+1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.  
* **Photo Goggles.** The equipped model ignores the STEALTH Keyword when making ranged attacks. In addition, the range of its weapons cannot be reduced.

**Abilities**

* **Clamber.** The Ratling Tankstopper has \+1 DICE to all Climb Success Rolls.  
* **Deadshot.** When the Ratling Tankstopper makes a ranged attack with a TWO-HANDED weapon, it can choose to suffer \-1 DICE to Hit in exchange for \+1 INJURY DICE.

**Keywords**  
MILITARUM, SKIRMISHER, STEALTH
